methodology:
METHODOLOGY
Inclusion Criteria
Tier 1: Public company; directly supplies physical auto components; revenue ~$2B+
Tier 2: Public company; supplies sub-assemblies or specialty components to Tier 1 or OEMs
Exclusion Criteria
OEMs (vehicle manufacturers), oil & gas companies, trading companies,
pure financial/holding entities, diversified industrials with <10% auto revenue.
Financial Data
Figures are latest quarter (Q4 2025 or Q1 2026 where available) when latest_quarter_financials.json is present; otherwise annual.
All financials in USD. Non-USD figures converted using FY-average exchange rates.
Revenue, SG&A and EBIT from SEC 10-Q (US), Yahoo (Canada TSX, Europe, Korea), quarterly_overrides.json (gaps), or annual fallback.
Japan/HK/Mexico and some symbols (e.g. Valeo FR.PA) often have no Yahoo quarterly P&L; see LIMITATIONS.md.
SG&A% = SG&A / Revenue.  EBIT% = EBIT / Revenue.
EXCLUDED COMPANIES
